VBA MACRO Module10.bas 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/Module10'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
'--- Standart ModÃžl ---
Option Explicit

' Class nesnesini tutmak iÃ§in Public deÄiÅken (Makro dosyasÄą aÃ§Äąk olduÄu sÃžrece yaÅar)
Public SayfaIzleyiciNesnesi As clsSayfaIzleyici

'Åerit Ãžzerinden tetklenir. B sÃžtunundaki boÅ malzeme satÄąrÄąnÄą otomatik doldurur.
'#Åerit Ãžzerine eklenen checkbox ile tetiklenir. aÃ§ÄąldÄąÄÄąnda
'B sÃžtunda yazÄąlan kodlar malzeme listelerinde bulunuyor ise fiyat aÃ§Äąklama, iskonto gibi bilgileri getirir

Sub Checkbox_OnAction(control As IRibbonControl, pressed As Boolean)
    CheckboxState = pressed ' Yeni durumu deÄiÅkende sakla
    
    Select Case control.Id
        Case "chkYeniSecenek"
            If pressed Then
                Call Otomatik_Dolum_open
                'MsgBox "Ãzel SeÃ§enek Aktif!"
                ' Checkbox iÅaretlendiÄinde yapÄąlacak iÅlemler
            Else
                Call SayfaIzlemeyiDurdur
                'MsgBox "Ãzel SeÃ§enek Pasif!"
                ' Checkbox iÅareti kaldÄąrÄąldÄąÄÄąnda yapÄąlacak iÅlemler
            End If
    End Select
    
    ' Belki baÅka kontrolleri etkinleÅtirmek/devre dÄąÅÄą bÄąrakmak istersiniz
    ' myRibbon.InvalidateControl "btnYeni1" ' Ãrn: btnYeni1'in durumunu gÃžncelle
End Sub

Sub Otomatik_Dolum_open()
    Dim wbAcilanSablon As Workbook
    Dim sablonDosyaYolu As String
    Dim izlenecekSayfaAdi As String
    
    'aktif dosya yolunu al
    Call GetActiveWorkbookPath
    
    sablonDosyaYolu = GetSetting("sercan", "fileOpenWorkBooks", "nowOpenPropsFile")
    izlenecekSayfaAdi = "Sayfa1" ' Veya Åablondaki ilgili sayfanÄąn adÄą

    ' ... (Gerekirse diÄer kodlar) ...

    ' Åablonu aÃ§
    Set wbAcilanSablon = Workbooks.Open(sablonDosyaYolu)

    ' EÄer baÅarÄąyla aÃ§ÄąldÄąysa izlemeyi baÅlat
    If Not wbAcilanSablon Is Nothing Then
       Call SayfaIzlemeyiBaslat(wbAcilanSablon, izlenecekSayfaAdi)
    End If
End Sub


Sub SayfaIzlemeyiBaslat(ByVal wbTemplate As Workbook, ByVal sheetNameToWatch As String)
    ' wbTemplate: OlaylarÄą izlenecek Åablon Ã§alÄąÅma kitabÄą
    ' sheetNameToWatch: OlaylarÄą izlenecek sayfanÄąn adÄą (Ãķrn. "Sayfa1" veya aktif sayfanÄąn adÄą)

    Dim wsToWatch As Worksheet

    On Error Resume Next ' Sayfa bulunamazsa hatayÄą yakala
    Set wsToWatch = wbTemplate.Worksheets(sheetNameToWatch)
    On Error GoTo 0 ' Normal hata iÅlemeye dÃķn

    If wsToWatch Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "'" & sheetNameToWatch & "' sayfasÄą '" & wbTemplate.Name & "' kitabÄąnda bulunamadÄą. Ä°zleme baÅlatÄąlamadÄą."
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' Mevcut bir izleyici varsa temizle (gÃžvenlik iÃ§in)
    Set SayfaIzleyiciNesnesi = Nothing

    ' Yeni Class nesnesi oluÅtur ve hedef sayfayÄą ata
    Set SayfaIzleyiciNesnesi = New clsSayfaIzleyici
    SayfaIzleyiciNesnesi.Init wsToWatch

    Debug.Print "'" & wsToWatch.Name & "' sayfasÄą iÃ§in izleme baÅlatÄąldÄą."

End Sub

Sub SayfaIzlemeyiDurdur()
    ' Åablon kitabÄą kapatÄąldÄąÄÄąnda veya izleme durdurulmak istendiÄinde Ã§aÄrÄąlÄąr
    Set SayfaIzleyiciNesnesi = Nothing
    Debug.Print "Sayfa izleme durduruldu."
End Sub


Sub ExcelMalzemeListeleriBirlestir()

    Dim fso As Object          ' FileSystemObject
    Dim anaKlasor As Object
    Dim altKlasor As Object
    Dim dosya As Object
    Dim wbKaynak As Workbook
    Dim wsKaynak As Worksheet
    Dim wbHedef As Workbook
    Dim wsHedef As Worksheet
    ' Dim rngKaynak As Range ' KaldÄąrÄąldÄą
    ' Dim sonSatirHedef As Long ' KaldÄąrÄąldÄą - rHedef kullanÄąlacak
    Dim sonSatirKaynak As Long
    Dim rKaynak As Long        ' Kaynak satÄąr sayacÄą
    Dim rHedef As Long         ' Hedef satÄąr sayacÄą (Genel sayaÃ§ olacak)
    Dim startRowKaynak As Long ' Kaynakta veri baÅlangÄąÃ§ satÄąrÄą (baÅlÄąklarÄą atlamak iÃ§in)
    Dim anaKlasorYolu As String
    Dim hedefDosyaYolu As String
    Dim hedefSayfaAdi As String
    Dim kaynakSayfaAdi As String
    Dim currentReferans As Variant ' K sÃžtunundaki son geÃ§erli deÄeri tutmak iÃ§in

    ' --- Ayarlar ---
    anaKlasorYolu = "C:\Belgelerim\cemex\Malzeme Listeleri" ' Ana klasÃķrÃžnÃžzÃžn yolu
    hedefDosyaYolu = anaKlasorYolu & "\TÃžmExcelListeleri.xlsb"
    hedefSayfaAdi = "Sayfa1" ' Hedef dosyada verilerin ekleneceÄi sayfa adÄą
    kaynakSayfaAdi = "Sayfa1" ' Kaynak dosyalarda verilerin alÄąnacaÄÄą sayfa adÄą
    startRowKaynak = 2       ' Kaynak dosyalarda verilerin baÅladÄąÄÄą satÄąr (GÃķrseldeki gibi baÅlÄąk varsayÄąldÄą)
    ' -------------

    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi

    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    Application.EnableEvents = False

    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")

    If Not fso.FolderExists(anaKlasorYolu) Then
        MsgBox "Ana klasÃķr bulunamadÄą: " & anaKlasorYolu, vbCritical, "Hata"
        GoTo Cikis
    End If
    Set anaKlasor = fso.GetFolder(anaKlasorYolu)

    ' Hedef dosya yÃķnetimi
    If Not fso.FileExists(hedefDosyaYolu) Then
        Set wbHedef = Workbooks.Add
        On Error Resume Next
        wbHedef.Worksheets(1).Name = hedefSayfaAdi
        On Error GoTo HataYonetimi
        wbHedef.SaveAs fileName:=hedefDosyaYolu, FileFormat:=xlExcel12
        If Err.Number <> 0 Then
             MsgBox "Hedef dosya oluÅturulamadÄą veya kaydedilemedi: " & hedefDosyaYolu & vbCrLf & Err.Description, vbCritical
             wbHedef.Close False
             GoTo Cikis
        End If
        Debug.Print "Hedef dosya oluÅturuldu: " & hedefDosyaYolu
    Else
        On Error Resume Next
        Set wbHedef = Workbooks.Open(hedefDosyaYolu)
        If Err.Number <> 0 Then
            MsgBox "Hedef dosya aÃ§ÄąlamadÄą: " & hedefDosyaYolu & vbCrLf & "LÃžtfen dosyanÄąn baÅka bir yerde aÃ§Äąk olmadÄąÄÄąndan emin olun.", vbCritical
            GoTo Cikis
        End If
        Debug.Print "Hedef dosya aÃ§ÄąldÄą: " & hedefDosyaYolu
        On Error GoTo HataYonetimi
    End If

    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsHedef = wbHedef.Worksheets(hedefSayfaAdi)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        MsgBox "Hedef dosyada '" & hedefSayfaAdi & "' sayfasÄą bulunamadÄą!", vbCritical
        wbHedef.Close False
        GoTo Cikis
    End If
    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi

    ' *** YENÄ° ADIM: Hedef sayfayÄą temizle ***
    wsHedef.Cells.Clear
    Debug.Print "Hedef sayfa (" & wsHedef.Name & ") temizlendi."

    ' *** YENÄ° ADIM: BaÅlÄąklarÄą tekrar yaz ***
    With wsHedef
        .Cells(1, "A").Value = "REFERANS"     ' Kaynak K sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "B").Value = "SÄ°PARÄ°Å KODU" ' Kaynak B sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "C").Value = "AÃIKLAMA"      ' Kaynak C sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "D").Value = "ÃRETÄ°CÄ°"       ' Kaynak D sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "E").Value = "BÄ°RÄ°M"         ' Kaynak E sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "F").Value = "BR. FÄ°YAT"     ' Kaynak F sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "G").Value = "Ä°SKONTO"       ' Kaynak G sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "H").Value = "ADAM/DK"       ' Kaynak H sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        .Cells(1, "I").Value = "BOYUT"         ' Kaynak I sÃžtunu baÅlÄąÄÄą
        ' Gerekirse J, K, L vb. baÅlÄąklarÄą ekle
        .Rows(1).Font.Bold = True ' BaÅlÄąklarÄą kalÄąn yap
    End With
    Debug.Print "Hedef sayfaya baÅlÄąklar yazÄąldÄą."
    ' *** BAÅLIK YAZMA SONU ***

    rHedef = 2 ' Veri yazÄąlacak ilk satÄąr her zaman 2 olacak (baÅlÄąklardan sonra)

    ' --- Alt KlasÃķrleri ve DosyalarÄą Tara ---
    Debug.Print "Alt klasÃķrler taranÄąyor..."
    For Each altKlasor In anaKlasor.SubFolders
        Debug.Print "Ä°Ålenen Alt KlasÃķr: " & altKlasor.Name
        For Each dosya In altKlasor.Files
            If LCase(fso.GetExtensionName(dosya.Name)) = "xlsb" And _
               LCase(dosya.path) <> LCase(hedefDosyaYolu) Then

                Debug.Print "  Ä°Ålenen Kaynak Dosya: " & dosya.Name
                currentReferans = "" ' Her yeni kaynak dosya iÃ§in referansÄą sÄąfÄąrla

                On Error Resume Next
                Set wbKaynak = Workbooks.Open(dosya.path, UpdateLinks:=0, ReadOnly:=True)
                Application.Windows(wbKaynak.Name).Visible = False
                If Err.Number <> 0 Then
                    Debug.Print "    Hata: Kaynak dosya aÃ§ÄąlamadÄą - " & dosya.path & " - Hata: " & Err.Description
                    Err.Clear
                    GoTo SonrakiDosya
                End If
                On Error GoTo HataYonetimi

                On Error Resume Next
                Set wsKaynak = wbKaynak.Worksheets(kaynakSayfaAdi)
                If Err.Number <> 0 Then
                    Debug.Print "    UyarÄą: '" & kaynakSayfaAdi & "' sayfasÄą bulunamadÄą - " & dosya.path
                    wbKaynak.Close False
                    GoTo SonrakiDosya
                End If
                On Error GoTo HataYonetimi

                sonSatirKaynak = wsKaynak.Cells(wsKaynak.Rows.Count, "B").End(xlUp).row
                Debug.Print "    Veri kopyalanÄąyor. Hedef BaÅlangÄąÃ§ SatÄąrÄą: " & rHedef & ", Kaynak Son SatÄąr: " & sonSatirKaynak

                If sonSatirKaynak >= startRowKaynak Then
                    For rKaynak = startRowKaynak To sonSatirKaynak
                        ' A SÃžtunu (Referans) MantÄąÄÄą
                        If Not IsEmpty(wsKaynak.Cells(rKaynak, "K").Value) Then
                            currentReferans = wsKaynak.Cells(rKaynak, "K").Value
                        End If
                        wsHedef.Cells(rHedef, "A").Value = currentReferans

                        ' B-I SÃžtunlarÄąnÄą Kopyala
                        wsHedef.Cells(rHedef, "B").Resize(1, 8).Value = wsKaynak.Cells(rKaynak, "B").Resize(1, 8).Value

                        ' Hedef satÄąr sayacÄąnÄą artÄąr
                        rHedef = rHedef + 1
                    Next rKaynak
                Else
                     Debug.Print "    UyarÄą: Kaynak sayfada iÅlenecek veri bulunamadÄą (SatÄąr " & startRowKaynak & "'dan sonra) - " & dosya.path
                End If

                wbKaynak.Close False
                Set wbKaynak = Nothing
                Set wsKaynak = Nothing

            End If
SonrakiDosya:
        Next dosya
    Next altKlasor

    ' Hedef dosyadaki son verinin yazÄąldÄąÄÄą satÄąrdan sonrasÄąnÄą temizle (Ä°steÄe baÄlÄą, eski verilerden kalÄąntÄą olmamasÄą iÃ§in)
    ' On Error Resume Next ' SatÄąr yoksa hata vermesin
    ' wsHedef.Rows(rHedef & ":" & wsHedef.Rows.Count).ClearContents
    ' On Error GoTo HataYonetimi

    wbHedef.Save
    MsgBox "Ä°Ålem tamamlandÄą!" & vbCrLf & "Veriler '" & hedefDosyaYolu & "' dosyasÄąna eklendi.", vbInformation

Cikis:
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsKaynak = Nothing
    If Not wbKaynak Is Nothing Then
        If wbKaynak.Name <> ThisWorkbook.Name Then wbKaynak.Close False
    End If
    Set wbKaynak = Nothing
    Set wsHedef = Nothing
    If Not wbHedef Is Nothing Then
         If wbHedef.Name <> ThisWorkbook.Name Then wbHedef.Close True ' Hedefi kaydet ve kapat
    End If
    Set wbHedef = Nothing
    Set dosya = Nothing
    Set altKlasor = Nothing
    Set anaKlasor = Nothing
    Set fso = Nothing

    Application.EnableEvents = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Exit Sub

HataYonetimi:
    MsgBox "Beklenmeyen bir hata oluÅtu:" & vbCrLf & _
           "Hata No: " & Err.Number & vbCrLf & _
           "AÃ§Äąklama: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "Makro HatasÄą"
    GoTo Cikis

End Sub

Sub MlzVeriEkleMacrosu3()

    Dim wsKaynak As Worksheet
    Dim wbMaster As Workbook
    Dim wsMaster As Worksheet
    Dim masterFilePath As String
    Dim masterSheetName As String
    Dim sonSatirKaynak As Long, sonSatirMaster As Long
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    
    Dim dictMaster As Object
    Dim arrMasterValues As Variant
    Dim arrMasterFormatsF As Variant
    Dim arrMasterFormatsG As Variant
    Dim key As Variant
    Dim itemData(1 To 9) As Variant
    Dim retrievedData As Variant
    
    Dim bulunanSayac As Long
    Dim bfyt As String, kur As String, mkur As String
    Dim Ckar As Variant, nameo As Variant
    Dim cellBValue As String
    
    ' --- YENÄ°: Toplu BiÃ§imlendirme iÃ§in Range Nesneleri ---
    Dim rngProcessed As Range      ' Ä°Ålenen tÃžm satÄąrlar (Genel formatlama)
    Dim rngFormatUSD As Range      ' F sÃžtunu $ olacak satÄąrlar
    Dim rngFormatEUR As Range      ' F sÃžtunu âŽ olacak satÄąrlar
    Dim rngOTM As Range            ' OTM sayfa formatÄą uygulanacaklar
    Dim rngNonOTM As Range         ' OTM olmayan (formÃžllÃž) sayfa formatÄą uygulanacaklar
    Dim rngNonOTM_JX As Range      ' OTM olmayan J-X sÃžtunlarÄą
    Dim rngNonOTM_WX As Range      ' OTM olmayan W-X sÃžtunlarÄą (Tpbr iÃ§in)
    ' --- YENÄ° SON ---
    
    Set wsKaynak = ActiveSheet
    masterFilePath = "C:\Belgelerim\cemex\Malzeme Listeleri\TÃžmExcelListeleri.xlsb"
    masterSheetName = "Sayfa1"
    
    Set dictMaster = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictMaster.CompareMode = vbTextCompare

    ' --- bfyt ayarÄą (DeÄiÅiklik yok) ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Ckar = ThisWorkbook.names("CkarO").RefersToR1C1
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        Err.Clear
        On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
        If MsgBox("'CkarO' adlÄą ad tanÄąmlÄą deÄil. VarsayÄąlan ('Liste FiyatÄą') oluÅturulsun mu?", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbYes Then
            ThisWorkbook.names.Add Name:="CkarO", RefersToR1C1:="=""Liste FiyatÄą"""
            bfyt = "=RC[-6]"
        Else
            MsgBox "Ä°Ålem iptal edildi.", vbInformation
            Exit Sub
        End If
    Else
        On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
        If Ckar = "=""Net FiyatÄą""" Then bfyt = "=RC[-1]" Else bfyt = "=RC[-6]"
    End If
    ' --- bfyt ayarlandÄą ---

    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    Application.StatusBar = "Ana malzeme listesi hafÄązaya yÃžkleniyor..."

    If dir(masterFilePath) = "" Then GoTo DosyaYok
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wbMaster = Workbooks(dir(masterFilePath))
    If wbMaster Is Nothing Then
        Set wbMaster = Workbooks.Open(masterFilePath, ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)
        If wbMaster Is Nothing Then GoTo DosyaAcilamadi
    End If
    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro

    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsMaster = wbMaster.Worksheets(masterSheetName)
    If wsMaster Is Nothing Then GoTo SayfaYok
    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro

    ' === Ana Listeyi Oku ve Dictionary'ye YÃžkle (DeÄiÅiklik yok) ===
    sonSatirMaster = wsMaster.Cells(wsMaster.Rows.Count, "B").End(xlUp).row
    If sonSatirMaster < 2 Then GoTo VeriYok
    
    arrMasterValues = wsMaster.Range("A1:I" & sonSatirMaster).Value
    arrMasterFormatsF = wsMaster.Range("F1:F" & sonSatirMaster).NumberFormat
    arrMasterFormatsG = wsMaster.Range("G1:G" & sonSatirMaster).NumberFormat
    
    wbMaster.Close False
    Set wbMaster = Nothing
    Set wsMaster = Nothing
    
    For j = 2 To sonSatirMaster
        key = arrMasterValues(j, 2)
        If Not IsEmpty(key) And Not dictMaster.exists(key) Then
            itemData(1) = arrMasterValues(j, 1) ' A
            itemData(2) = arrMasterValues(j, 3) ' C
            itemData(3) = arrMasterValues(j, 4) ' D
            itemData(4) = arrMasterValues(j, 6) ' F
            itemData(5) = arrMasterValues(j, 7) ' G
            itemData(6) = arrMasterValues(j, 8) ' H
            itemData(7) = arrMasterValues(j, 9) ' I
            itemData(8) = arrMasterFormatsF(j, 1) ' F Format
            itemData(9) = arrMasterFormatsG(j, 1) ' G Format
            dictMaster.Add key, itemData
        End If
    Next j
    
    Erase arrMasterValues
    Erase arrMasterFormatsF
    Erase arrMasterFormatsG
    
    ' === Dictionary YÃžklendi ===

    sonSatirKaynak = wsKaynak.Cells(wsKaynak.Rows.Count, "B").End(xlUp).row
    bulunanSayac = 0

    ' === ANA DÃNGÃ: SADECE VERÄ° VE FORMÃL YAZMA ===
    For i = 2 To sonSatirKaynak
        
        ' HÄąz iÃ§in: Her 100 satÄąrda bir durum Ã§ubuÄunu gÃžncelle
        If i Mod 100 = 0 Then
            Application.StatusBar = "SatÄąr " & i & "/" & sonSatirKaynak & " iÅleniyor..."
        End If

        If Not IsEmpty(wsKaynak.Cells(i, "B").Value) And IsEmpty(wsKaynak.Cells(i, "A").Value) Then
            cellBValue = Trim(UCase(CStr(wsKaynak.Cells(i, "B").Value)))
            
            If cellBValue <> "BÃLÃM TOPLAMI:" And cellBValue <> "BÃLÃM ADI/NO:" Then
                lookupValue = wsKaynak.Cells(i, "B").Value

                If dictMaster.exists(lookupValue) Then
                    retrievedData = dictMaster(lookupValue)
                    bulunanSayac = bulunanSayac + 1
                    
                    ' --- BÄ°ÃÄ°MLENDÄ°RME NESNELERÄ°NE EKLEME ---
                    If rngProcessed Is Nothing Then
                        Set rngProcessed = wsKaynak.Rows(i)
                    Else
                        Set rngProcessed = Union(rngProcessed, wsKaynak.Rows(i))
                    End If
                    ' ---

                    ' 1. VERÄ°LERÄ° YAZ (BiÃ§imlendirmesiz)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "A").Value = retrievedData(1)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "C").Value = retrievedData(2)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "D").Value = retrievedData(3)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").Value = retrievedData(4)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "G").Value = retrievedData(5)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "H").Value = retrievedData(6)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "I").Value = retrievedData(7)
                    
                    ' 2. KUR'u belirle (FormatÄą henÃžz UYGULAMA, sadece grupla)
                    kur = ""
                    If retrievedData(8) = "#,##0.00 [$$-C0C]" Then
                        kur = "*Usd"
                        If rngFormatUSD Is Nothing Then Set rngFormatUSD = wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F") Else Set rngFormatUSD = Union(rngFormatUSD, wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F"))
                    ElseIf retrievedData(8) = "#,##0.00 [$âŽ-1]" Then
                        kur = "*Eur"
                        If rngFormatEUR Is Nothing Then Set rngFormatEUR = wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F") Else Set rngFormatEUR = Union(rngFormatEUR, wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F"))
                    End If
                     
                    ' 3. FORMÃLLERÄ° YAZ
                    If Left(wsKaynak.CodeName, 3) <> "OTM" Then
                        ' OTM DeÄilse: FormÃžlleri yaz ve OTM-deÄil grubuna ekle
                        If rngNonOTM Is Nothing Then Set rngNonOTM = wsKaynak.Rows(i) Else Set rngNonOTM = Union(rngNonOTM, wsKaynak.Rows(i))
                        
                        mkur = kur: If bfyt = "=RC[-1]" Then mkur = ""

                        Dim referansA As String
                        referansA = CStr(retrievedData(1)) ' A sÃžtununa yazdÄąÄÄąmÄąz deÄeri kullan

                        If Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MP" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Oisci/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MS" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Osarf/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MA" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Oamb/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MN" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Onak/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MB" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Obara/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 3) = "PP-" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Opano/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 3) = "PS-" Then
                            On Error Resume Next
                            nameo = ThisWorkbook.names("Opsac").RefersToR1C1
                            If Err.Number = 0 And Not IsEmpty(nameo) Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Opsac/100" & mkur Else wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Opano/100" & mkur
                            Err.Clear
                            On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
                        Else
                            wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Osalt/100" & mkur ' VarsayÄąlan
                        End If

                        ' DiÄer FormÃžller (J, K, M-X)
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "J").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-2]*Ads/60"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "N").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-3]*Oggid/100"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "K").FormulaR1C1 = "=(RC[-5]-RC[-5]*RC[-4])" & kur
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "M").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-3]*Oisci/100"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "O").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-10]*RC[-9]" & kur
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "P").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-11]*RC[-5]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "Q").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-12]*RC[-7]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "R").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-13]*RC[-6]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "S").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-14]*RC[-6]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "T").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-15]*RC[-12]/60"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "U").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-7]*RC[-16]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "W").FormulaR1C1 = "=(RC[-13]+RC[-12]+RC[-11]+RC[-10]+RC[-9])*Dcki/Tpb"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "X").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-19]*RC[-1]"
                    Else
                        ' OTM sayfasÄąysa: FormÃžlleri temizle ve OTM grubuna ekle
                        If rngOTM Is Nothing Then Set rngOTM = wsKaynak.Range("J" & i & ":N" & i & ",O" & i & ":X" & i) Else Set rngOTM = Union(rngOTM, wsKaynak.Range("J" & i & ":N" & i & ",O" & i & ":X" & i))
                    End If
                    
                    ' --- DÃNGÃ Ä°ÃÄ°NDEKÄ° TÃM BÄ°ÃÄ°MLENDÄ°RME KODLARI KALDIRILDI ---
                    
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    ' === ANA DÃNGÃ SONA ERDÄ° ===
    
    Application.StatusBar = "Toplu biÃ§imlendirme uygulanÄąyor..."

    ' === TOPLU BÄ°ÃÄ°MLENDÄ°RME BAÅLANGICI ===
    
    ' EÄer hiÃ§ satÄąr bulunamadÄąysa, formatlamayÄą atla
    If rngProcessed Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Ä°Ålenecek veri bulunamadÄą veya tÃžm veriler gÃžncel.", vbInformation
        GoTo Cikis_Makro
    End If

    ' 1. OTM: J-X arasÄąnÄą temizle
    If Not rngOTM Is Nothing Then
        rngOTM.ClearContents
    End If

    ' 2. Genel BiÃ§imlendirme (TÃžm iÅlenen satÄąrlar iÃ§in)
    With rngProcessed.Range("A1:U1,W1:X1") ' V sÃžtunu hariÃ§
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Font.Bold = False
        .Font.ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
        .Font.Size = 9
        .Font.Name = "Arial"
    End With
    
    ' 3. Hizalama
    With rngProcessed.Range("A1:D1")
        .HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft
        .NumberFormat = "@" ' Metin
    End With
    With rngProcessed.Range("E1:U1,W1:X1") ' V hariÃ§
        .HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
    End With
    
    ' 4. Ãzel SayÄą BiÃ§imleri
    rngProcessed.Range("E1").NumberFormat = "#,##0" ' Miktar
    rngProcessed.Range("F1").NumberFormat = "#,##0.00" ' Fiyat (VarsayÄąlan TL)
    rngProcessed.Range("G1").NumberFormat = "0.0%"    ' Ä°skonto
    rngProcessed.Range("H1").NumberFormat = "#,##0"    ' Adam/dk
    
    ' 5. Kur Renkleri
    If Not rngFormatUSD Is Nothing Then
        rngFormatUSD.Font.ColorIndex = 3
        ' Ä°steÄe baÄlÄą: Para birimi formatÄąnÄą da burada toplu ata
        ' rngFormatUSD.NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$$-C0C]"
    End If
    If Not rngFormatEUR Is Nothing Then
        rngFormatEUR.Font.ColorIndex = 5
        ' Ä°steÄe baÄlÄą: Para birimi formatÄąnÄą da burada toplu ata
        ' rngFormatEUR.NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$âŽ-1]"
    End If
    
    ' 6. OTM Olmayan SatÄąrlarÄąn BiÃ§imlendirmesi (J-X)
    If Not rngNonOTM Is Nothing Then
        ' J'den X'e kadar varsayÄąlan sayÄą formatÄą
        rngNonOTM.Range("J1:X1").NumberFormat = "#,##0.00"
        
        ' W ve X SÃžtunlarÄąnÄą Tpbr'ye gÃķre Ãķzel formatla
        On Error Resume Next
        Dim tpbrValue As String
        tpbrValue = ThisWorkbook.names("Tpbr").RefersToRange.Value
        If Err.Number = 0 And Not IsEmpty(tpbrValue) Then
            Select Case tpbrValue
                Case "Teklif Para Birimi (TL)"
                    ' Zaten #,##0.00 yapÄąldÄą
                Case "Teklif Para Birimi (EUR)"
                    rngNonOTM.Range("W1,X1").NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$âŽ-1]"
                Case "Teklif Para Birimi (USD)"
                    rngNonOTM.Range("W1,X1").NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$$-C0C]"
            End Select
        End If
        Err.Clear
        On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
    End If
    ' === TOPLU BÄ°ÃÄ°MLENDÄ°RME SONU ===
    
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox bulunanSayac & " adet satÄąr iÃ§in veri ve formatlama ana listeden gÃžncellendi.", vbInformation
    GoTo Cikis_Makro

' === HATA YÃNETÄ°MÄ° ETÄ°KETLERÄ° ===
DosyaYok:
    MsgBox "Ana malzeme listesi dosyasÄą bulunamadÄą: " & masterFilePath, vbCritical
    GoTo Cikis_Makro
DosyaAcilamadi:
    MsgBox "Ana malzeme listesi dosyasÄą aÃ§ÄąlamadÄą: " & masterFilePath, vbCritical
    GoTo Cikis_Makro
SayfaYok:
    MsgBox "'" & masterSheetName & "' sayfasÄą ana listede bulunamadÄą!", vbExclamation
    If Not wbMaster Is Nothing Then wbMaster.Close False
    GoTo Cikis_Makro
VeriYok:
    MsgBox "Ana listede veri bulunamadÄą.", vbExclamation
    If Not wbMaster Is Nothing Then wbMaster.Close False
    GoTo Cikis_Makro

Cikis_Makro:
    On Error Resume Next
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Set wbMaster = Nothing
    Set wsMaster = Nothing
    Set wsKaynak = Nothing
    Set dictMaster = Nothing
    Set rngProcessed = Nothing
    Set rngFormatUSD = Nothing
    Set rngFormatEUR = Nothing
    Set rngOTM = Nothing
    Set rngNonOTM = Nothing
    Exit Sub

HataYonetimi_Makro:
    MsgBox "MlzVeriEkleMacrosu iÃ§inde hata oluÅtu:" & vbCrLf & _
            "Hata No: " & Err.Number & vbCrLf & _
            "AÃ§Äąklama: " & Err.Description & vbCrLf & _
            "Ä°Ålenen SatÄąr (YaklaÅÄąk): " & i, vbCritical, "Makro HatasÄą"
    GoTo Cikis_Makro

End Sub

Sub MlzVeriEkleMacrosu31()

    Dim wsKaynak As Worksheet ' Verinin ekleneceÄi sayfa (Aktif Sayfa)
    Dim wbMaster As Workbook
    Dim wsMaster As Worksheet
    Dim masterFilePath As String
    Dim masterSheetName As String
    Dim sonSatirKaynak As Long
    Dim i As Long ' DÃķngÃž iÃ§in satÄąr sayacÄą (verilergir'deki 'Y' ve 'k' yerine)
    Dim lookupValue As Variant
    Dim rngFound As Range
    Dim masterRow As Long
    Dim bulunanSayac As Long
    Dim bfyt As String ' bfyt deÄiÅkenini burada da tanÄąmla
    Dim kur As String  ' kur deÄiÅkenini burada da tanÄąmla
    Dim mkur As String ' mkur deÄiÅkeni
    Dim Ckar As Variant ' CkarO kontrolÃž iÃ§in
    Dim nameo As Variant ' Opsac kontrolÃž iÃ§in
    Dim cellBValue As String ' B sÃžtunundaki deÄeri kontrol etmek iÃ§in

    ' Ayarlar
    Set wsKaynak = ActiveSheet ' Aktif olan Ã§alÄąÅma sayfasÄąnÄą referans al
    masterFilePath = "C:\Belgelerim\cemex\Malzeme Listeleri\TÃžmExcelListeleri.xlsb" ' Ana listenin tam yolu
    masterSheetName = "Sayfa1" ' Ana listedeki sayfa adÄą

    ' --- bfyt'yi ayarla (UserForm_Initialize'daki gibi) ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Ckar = ThisWorkbook.names("CkarO").RefersToR1C1
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        Err.Clear
        On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
        If MsgBox("'CkarO' adlÄą ad tanÄąmlÄą deÄil. VarsayÄąlan ('Liste FiyatÄą') oluÅturulsun mu?", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbYes Then
             ThisWorkbook.names.Add Name:="CkarO", RefersToR1C1:="=""Liste FiyatÄą"""
             bfyt = "=RC[-6]"
        Else
             MsgBox "Ä°Ålem iptal edildi.", vbInformation
             Exit Sub
        End If
    Else
        On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
        If Ckar = "=""Net FiyatÄą""" Then bfyt = "=RC[-1]" Else bfyt = "=RC[-6]"
    End If
    ' --- bfyt ayarlandÄą ---

    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro

    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual ' HesaplamayÄą manuel yap
    Application.EnableEvents = False ' OlaylarÄą durdur

    ' Ana dosya var mÄą kontrol et
    If dir(masterFilePath) = "" Then
        MsgBox "Ana malzeme listesi dosyasÄą bulunamadÄą: " & masterFilePath, vbCritical
        GoTo Cikis_Makro
    End If

    ' Ana dosyayÄą aÃ§ (HenÃžz aÃ§Äąk deÄilse)
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wbMaster = Workbooks(dir(masterFilePath))
    If wbMaster Is Nothing Then
        Set wbMaster = Workbooks.Open(masterFilePath, ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)
        If wbMaster Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox "Ana malzeme listesi dosyasÄą aÃ§ÄąlamadÄą: " & masterFilePath & vbCrLf & "LÃžtfen dosyanÄąn baÅka bir yerde aÃ§Äąk olmadÄąÄÄąndan emin olun.", vbCritical
            GoTo Cikis_Makro
        End If
        Application.Windows(wbMaster.Name).Visible = False
    End If
    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro

    ' Ana Ã§alÄąÅma sayfasÄąnÄą ayarla
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsMaster = wbMaster.Worksheets(masterSheetName)
    If wsMaster Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "'" & masterSheetName & "' sayfasÄą ana listede bulunamadÄą!", vbExclamation
        If Workbooks.Count > 1 Then wbMaster.Close False ' Sadece bu makro aÃ§tÄąysa kapat
        GoTo Cikis_Makro
    End If
    On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro

    ' Kaynak sayfadaki son dolu satÄąrÄą bul (B sÃžtununa gÃķre)
    sonSatirKaynak = wsKaynak.Cells(wsKaynak.Rows.Count, "B").End(xlUp).row
    bulunanSayac = 0

    ' Kaynak sayfadaki satÄąrlarÄą tara
    For i = 2 To sonSatirKaynak ' 1. satÄąr baÅlÄąk varsayÄąldÄą
        Application.StatusBar = "SatÄąr " & i & "/" & sonSatirKaynak & " iÅleniyor..."

        ' EÄer B sÃžtunu dolu ve A sÃžtunu boÅ ise
        If Not IsEmpty(wsKaynak.Cells(i, "B").Value) And IsEmpty(wsKaynak.Cells(i, "A").Value) Then

            ' *** YENÄ° KONTROL BAÅLANGICI ***
            ' B sÃžtunundaki deÄeri al (boÅluklarÄą temizle ve bÃžyÃžk harfe Ã§evirerek kontrol et)
            cellBValue = Trim(UCase(CStr(wsKaynak.Cells(i, "B").Value)))

            ' EÄer B sÃžtunundaki deÄer istenmeyen metinlerden BÄ°RÄ° DEÄÄ°LSE iÅlem yap
            If cellBValue <> "BÃLÃM TOPLAMI:" And cellBValue <> "BÃLÃM ADI/NO:" Then
            ' *** YENÄ° KONTROL SONU ***

                lookupValue = wsKaynak.Cells(i, "B").Value ' Arama deÄerini burada ayarla

                ' Ana listede deÄeri bul
                Set rngFound = wsMaster.Columns("B").Find(What:=lookupValue, LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole, MatchCase:=False)

                ' EÄer bulunduysa
                If Not rngFound Is Nothing Then
                    masterRow = rngFound.row
                    bulunanSayac = bulunanSayac + 1

                    ' ---- verigir Makrosundan Uyarlanan Kod BaÅlangÄącÄą ----

                    ' 1. GENEL VERÄ°LERÄ° Ana Listeden Ãek ve Hedefe Yaz
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "A").Value = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "A").Value ' Referans (ug1 olmadan)
                    ' wsKaynak.Cells(i, "B").Value = lookupValue ' B zaten dolu
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "C").Value = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "C").Value ' YapÄąlacak Ä°Åin Cinsi
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "D").Value = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "D").Value ' Ãretici
                    'wsKaynak.Cells(i, "E").Value = 1 ' Miktar (VarsayÄąlan 1)
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").Value = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "F").Value ' Mlz. Br. Fiyat
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").NumberFormat = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "F").NumberFormat ' FormatÄą al
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "G").Value = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "G").Value ' mlz.isk.
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "G").NumberFormat = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "G").NumberFormat ' FormatÄą al
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "H").Value = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "H").Value ' Adam/dk
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "I").Value = wsMaster.Cells(masterRow, "I").Value ' Boyut

                    ' 2. KUR'u belirle (YazÄąlan F sÃžtunu formatÄąna gÃķre)
                    kur = ""
                    If wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$$-C0C]" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").Font.ColorIndex = 3: kur = "*Usd"
                    If wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$âŽ-1]" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").Font.ColorIndex = 5: kur = "*Eur"

                    ' 3. ÃRÃN GRUPLARI ve FormÃžlleri Uygula (L SÃžtunu ve J, K, M-X)
                    If Left(wsKaynak.CodeName, 3) <> "OTM" Then ' Sadece OTM olmayan sayfalarda formÃžl uygula
                        mkur = kur: If bfyt = "=RC[-1]" Then mkur = "" ' Net fiyatsa kur ekleme (L hariÃ§ formÃžllerde)

                        ' L SÃžtunu FormÃžlÃž (A sÃžtunundaki deÄere gÃķre)
                        Dim referansA As String
                        referansA = CStr(wsKaynak.Cells(i, "A").Value)

                        If Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MP" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Oisci/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MS" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Osarf/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MA" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Oamb/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MN" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Onak/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 5) = "PM-MB" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Obara/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 3) = "PP-" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Opano/100" & mkur
                        ElseIf Left(referansA, 3) = "PS-" Then
                            On Error Resume Next
                            nameo = ThisWorkbook.names("Opsac").RefersToR1C1
                            If Err.Number = 0 And Not IsEmpty(nameo) Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Opsac/100" & mkur Else wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Opano/100" & mkur
                            Err.Clear
                            On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
                        Else
                            wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = bfyt & "*Osalt/100" & mkur ' VarsayÄąlan
                        End If

                        ' DiÄer FormÃžller (J, K, M-X)
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "J").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-2]*Ads/60"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "N").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-3]*Oggid/100"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "K").FormulaR1C1 = "=(RC[-5]-RC[-5]*RC[-4])" & kur
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "L").FormulaR1C1 = "=(RC[-6])* Osalt/100 "
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "M").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-3]*Oisci/100"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "O").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-10]*RC[-9]" & kur
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "P").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-11]*RC[-5]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "Q").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-12]*RC[-7]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "R").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-13]*RC[-6]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "S").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-14]*RC[-6]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "T").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-15]*RC[-12]/60"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "U").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-7]*RC[-16]"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "W").FormulaR1C1 = "=(RC[-13]+RC[-12]+RC[-11]+RC[-10]+RC[-9])*Dcki/Tpb"
                        wsKaynak.Cells(i, "X").FormulaR1C1 = "=RC[-19]*RC[-1]"
                    Else
                         ' OTM sayfasÄąysa formÃžlleri temizle
                         wsKaynak.Range("J" & i & ":N" & i & ",O" & i & ":X" & i).ClearContents
                    End If ' OTM kontrolÃž sonu

                    ' 4. BiÃ§imlendirmeleri Uygula
                    ' *** YENÄ°/GÃNCELLENMÄ°Å: SayÄąsal BiÃ§imlendirmeleri AÃIKÃA Ayarla (Ä°stenen formata) ***
                    With wsKaynak.Rows(i) ' Ä°Ålenen satÄąr iÃ§in
                        ' F SÃžtunu (Br. Fiyat)
                        .Cells(1, "F").NumberFormat = "#,##0.00"  ' VirgÃžl binlik, Nokta ondalÄąk

                        ' G SÃžtunu (Ä°skonto)
                        .Cells(1, "G").NumberFormat = "0.0%"     ' YÃžzde formatÄą

                        ' H SÃžtunu (Adam/dk) - GÃķrseldeki gibi ondalÄąksÄąz, binlik ayÄąrÄącÄąlÄą
                        .Cells(1, "H").NumberFormat = "#,##0"

                        ' DiÄer SayÄąsal SÃžtunlar (J-X) - EÄer OTM deÄilse
                        If Left(wsKaynak.CodeName, 3) <> "OTM" Then
                             'J'den X'e kadar biÃ§imlendirme (X'ten Ãķnceki satÄąrda yapÄąlÄąyordu, buraya taÅÄądÄąk)
                             .Range("J" & i & ":X" & i).NumberFormat = "#,##0.00" ' J'den X'e kadar (Nokta ondalÄąk)

                             ' W ve X SÃžtunlarÄąnÄą Tpbr'ye gÃķre Ãķzel formatla
                             On Error Resume Next
                             Dim tpbrValue As String
                             tpbrValue = ThisWorkbook.names("Tpbr").RefersToRange.Value
                             If Err.Number = 0 And Not IsEmpty(tpbrValue) Then
                                 With .Range("W" & i & ",X" & i) ' W ve X hÃžcreleri iÃ§in
                                     Select Case tpbrValue
                                         Case "Teklif Para Birimi (TL)"
                                             .NumberFormat = "#,##0.00"
                                         Case "Teklif Para Birimi (EUR)"
                                             .NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$âŽ-1]"
                                         Case "Teklif Para Birimi (USD)"
                                             .NumberFormat = "#,##0.00 [$$-C0C]"
                                         Case Else
                                             .NumberFormat = "#,##0.00" ' VarsayÄąlan
                                     End Select
                                 End With
                             Else
                                 .Range("W" & i & ",X" & i).NumberFormat = "#,##0.00" ' Tpbr yoksa TL varsay
                                 Err.Clear
                             End If
                             On Error GoTo HataYonetimi_Makro
                        End If
                    End With
                    ' *** SayÄąsal BiÃ§imlendirme Sonu ***

                    ' DiÄer BiÃ§imlendirmeler (KenarlÄąk, Font, Hizalama vb.)
                    With wsKaynak.Range("A" & i & ":U" & i & ",W" & i & ":X" & i) ' V sÃžtunu hariÃ§
                        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
                        .Font.Bold = False
                        .Font.ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
                        .Font.Size = 9
                        .Font.Name = "Arial"
                    End With
                    With wsKaynak.Range("A" & i & ":D" & i)
                        .HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft
                        .NumberFormat = "@" ' Metin olarak formatla
                    End With
                    With wsKaynak.Range("E" & i & ":U" & i & ",W" & i & ":X" & i) ' V sÃžtunu hariÃ§
                        .HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
                    End With
                    wsKaynak.Cells(i, "E").NumberFormat = "#,##0" ' Miktar formatÄą (ondalÄąksÄąz)

                    ' Fiyat sÃžtunlarÄąndaki kur renklerini tekrar uygula (format deÄiÅtiÄi iÃ§in kaybolabilir)
                    If kur = "*Usd" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").Font.ColorIndex = 3
                    If kur = "*Eur" Then wsKaynak.Cells(i, "F").Font.ColorIndex = 5

                    ' ---- verigir Makrosundan Uyarlanan Kod Sonu ----

                End If ' Found
                Set rngFound = Nothing

            ' *** YENÄ° KONTROL iÃ§in End If ***
            End If ' cellBValue <> "BÃLÃM TOPLAMI:" And cellBValue <> "BÃLÃM ADI/NO:"

        'End If ' B dolu, A boÅ
    Next i ' Sonraki satÄąr

    ' Ana dosyayÄą kapat
    If Not wbMaster Is Nothing Then
        ' EÄer bu makro dÄąÅÄąnda baÅka Excel dosyasÄą aÃ§Äąk deÄilse ana dosyayÄą kapatma
        ' Sadece bu makro tarafÄąndan aÃ§ÄąldÄąysa ve baÅka workbook yoksa kapatÄąlÄąr.
        ' Ancak birden fazla workbook aÃ§Äąksa, hangisinin ana dosya olduÄunu bilmek zor.
        ' En gÃžvenli yol, eÄer baÅka workbook'lar aÃ§Äąksa kullanÄącÄąya sormak veya her zaman aÃ§Äąk bÄąrakmak olabilir.
        ' Åimdilik, sadece 1'den fazla workbook aÃ§Äąksa kapatÄąyoruz (bu, en azÄąndan Excel'in kendisinin aÃ§Äąk kalmasÄąnÄą saÄlar).
        If Workbooks.Count > 1 Then
             ' Daha gÃžvenli kapatma: Sadece bu makronun aÃ§tÄąÄÄą dosyayÄą kapattÄąÄÄąndan emin ol
             Dim wb As Workbook
             Dim openedByMacro As Boolean
             openedByMacro = False ' BaÅlangÄąÃ§ta false
             For Each wb In Workbooks
                 If wb.Name = dir(masterFilePath) Then
                     ' EÄer dosya adÄą eÅleÅiyorsa ve gÃķrÃžnÃžr deÄilse, muhtemelen bu makro aÃ§mÄąÅtÄąr
                     If Not Application.Windows(wb.Name).Visible Then
                         openedByMacro = True
                     End If
                     Exit For
                 End If
             Next wb

             If openedByMacro Then
                 wbMaster.Close False
             End If
        End If
    End If


    Application.StatusBar = False
    ' Ä°steÄe baÄlÄą: Bulunan sayaÃ§ mesajÄąnÄą tekrar aktif edebilirsiniz.
    ' MsgBox bulunanSayac & " adet satÄąr iÃ§in veri ve formatlama ana listeden gÃžncellendi.", vbInformation

Cikis_Makro:
    On Error Resume Next ' Hata yÃķnetimi Ã§ÄąkÄąÅta sorun Ã§ÄąkarmasÄąn
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic ' HesaplamayÄą otomatik yap
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Set wbMaster = Nothing
    Set wsMaster = Nothing
    Set rngFound = Nothing
    Set wsKaynak = Nothing
    Exit Sub

HataYonetimi_Makro:
    MsgBox "MlzVeriEkleMacrosu iÃ§inde hata oluÅtu:" & vbCrLf & _
           "Hata No: " & Err.Number & vbCrLf & _
           "AÃ§Äąklama: " & Err.Description & vbCrLf & _
           "Ä°Ålenen SatÄąr (YaklaÅÄąk): " & i, vbCritical, "Makro HatasÄą"
    GoTo Cikis_Makro ' Hata durumunda temizleyerek Ã§Äąk

End Sub
